allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); types={}; chapters={}; \\nfor q in data:\\n    types[q['type']] = types.get\(q['type'],0\)+1\\n    chapters[q['chapter']] = chapters.get\(q['chapter'],0\)+1\\nprint\('Types:', types\)\\nprint\('Total:', len\(data\)\)\\nprint\('Chapters:', list\(chapters.keys\(\)\)\)")
